inputs.description:
Fetch wikilinks and categories for all agents with Wikipedia articles.

cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot
sqlite3 data/index/bibliographic.db < scripts/enrichment/wikipedia_schema.sql 2>/dev/null || true
poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.batch_wikipedia --pass 1 --db data/index/bibliographic.db

Verify:
  python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); wc=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_cache').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Wikipedia cache: {wc}')"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); wc=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_cache').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Cache: {wc}')"
